title: dioscorea litoralis
intro: Dioscorea litoralis, also known as beach yam or coastal yam, is a type of yam that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as arthritis and skin issues. The health benefits of Dioscorea litoralis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Dioscorea litoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
